## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Linked Issue or Discussion

Link the issue or discussion that aligned the scope.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor

## Behavior Impact

- [ ] No sensitive defaults changed
- [ ] Related docs updated
- [ ] Related vars or sample inventory updated

## Validation

Describe what you ran to validate the change.

- [ ] Relevant `ansible-playbook --syntax-check` command(s) executed
- [ ] Logs or screenshots attached when useful
